perseverance.title: Landing
perseverance.description: Perseverance lands in Jezero Crater via Skycrane

perseverance.title: First Drive
perseverance.description: Drives 6.5 meters in first test drive

perseverance.title: Ingenuity First Flight
perseverance.description: Ingenuity makes history as first powered flight on another planet

perseverance.title: Delta Front Arrival
perseverance.description: Reaches the ancient river delta in Jezero Crater

perseverance.title: First Depot Sample
perseverance.description: Drops first sample tube at Three Forks depot

perseverance.title: Sol 1000
perseverance.description: Reaches 1000 sols on Mars, still exploring the delta

curiosity.title: Landing
curiosity.description: Curiosity lands in Gale Crater via Skycrane

curiosity.title: First Drive
curiosity.description: Drives 16 meters to test mobility system

curiosity.title: First Drill
curiosity.description: Drills into 'John Klein' rock — first interior sample on Mars

curiosity.title: Mount Sharp Base
curiosity.description: Arrives at the base of Mount Sharp (Aeolis Mons)

curiosity.title: Vera Rubin Ridge
curiosity.description: Begins exploration of Vera Rubin Ridge

curiosity.title: Clay Unit
curiosity.description: Explores clay-bearing unit with strongest clay signals

opportunity.title: Landing
opportunity.description: Opportunity bounces to a stop inside Eagle Crater

opportunity.title: Hole in One
opportunity.description: Lands directly next to exposed bedrock — 'hole in one'

opportunity.title: Endurance Crater
opportunity.description: Enters and explores 130m wide Endurance Crater

opportunity.title: Marathon
opportunity.description: Completes first marathon distance (42.195 km) on another world

opportunity.title: Perseverance Valley
opportunity.description: Begins exploring Perseverance Valley on Endeavour rim

opportunity.title: Last Contact
opportunity.description: Last communication before global dust storm ends mission

spirit.title: First Drive
spirit.description: Drives off the lander platform onto Martian soil

spirit.title: Columbia Hills
spirit.description: Reaches the Columbia Hills after 3.2 km drive across plains

spirit.title: Summit
spirit.description: Reaches summit of Husband Hill in Columbia Hills

spirit.title: Home Plate
spirit.description: Arrives at Home Plate volcanic formation

spirit.title: Stuck
spirit.description: Gets stuck in soft soil at 'Troy' — becomes stationary science platform
